scope.selection_note: Codex-only prep artifact for the current remaining route/project duplicate_global_identity issues. Local deterministic inspection found 6 route issues and 1 project issue after current merge and do-not-merge guards.
scope.write_limit: Exactly one artifact was written: data/review_notes/codex-identity-route-project-batch204-prep.json. No merges.json, do-not-merge.json, canonical JSONL, DB, LOG.md, manifest, wiki, submissions, or retired overrides were edited.
deterministic_inspection: Read-only duplicate-key scan over current canonical JSONL using identityKeysForRecord plus current merge/DNM guard logic.
Read-only canonical inspection of data/canonical/routes.jsonl and data/canonical/projects.jsonl.
Read-only guard checks against data/identity-overrides/merges.json and data/identity-overrides/do-not-merge.json.
Read-only source block inspection under raw/sources/*/blocks.jsonl for selected evidence.

validator_evidence: duplicate_global_identity: Global project records project_fordham-rd-bus-priority and project_fordham-rd-bus-priority-cb5-may2026 share identity key project_fordham-rd-bus-priority.
source_canonical_evidence: project_fordham-rd-bus-priority: display_name 'Fordham Road - Inwood Bus Priority', source_ids include 2021-2023 Fordham/Inwood sources, boroughs Bronx and Manhattan, description covers Bx12 corridor treatments including Fordham Road plus the 207th Street/University Heights Bridge connection to Inwood, with Alternatives A/B/C under analysis.

project_fordham-rd-bus-priority-cb5-may2026: display_name 'Fordham Road Bus Priority', source_ids are May 2026 CB5/CB6/CB7 Sedgwick Av to Bronx River Parkway sources, borough Bronx, description covers upgrading existing bus lanes to offset bus lanes and widened curbside bus lanes.
raw/sources/fordham_rd_inwood_cb6_jun2023/blocks.jsonl#p048_c0002 lists Alternative A Offset Bus Lanes, Alternative B Eastbound Busway, and Alternative C Two-Way Busway.
raw/sources/fordham_rd_inwood_cb6_jun2023/blocks.jsonl#p055_c0002 separately describes traffic analysis for University Heights Bridge and 207th Street Manhattan.
raw/sources/fordham_rd_sedgwick_ave_bronx_river_pkwy_cb6_may2026/blocks.jsonl#p001_c0002 scopes the later presentation to Sedgwick Av to Bronx River Parkway.
raw/sources/fordham_rd_sedgwick_ave_bronx_river_pkwy_cb6_may2026/blocks.jsonl#p004_c0002 presents a 2019-2026 timeline: outreach and analysis in 2020-2023, evaluation in 2023-2026, and 2026 outreach.
proposed_do_not_merge_pairs.reason: The records are related Fordham Road work but not a same-identity duplicate: the first is the broader Fordham/Inwood study and alternatives record, while the second is a later Bronx-only Sedgwick-to-Bronx-River segment/design phase. This is a parent/segment or phase distinction, so the duplicate key should be suppressed with DNM rather than an alias.

validator_evidence: duplicate_global_identity: Global route records route_b44-brt-phase2 and route_b44-limited share identity key route_b44.
source_canonical_evidence: route_b44-brt-phase2: display_name 'B44 (Nostrand Avenue)', source_id brt_intro_to_phase2, route_id/route_label B44, note says existing B44 service carries 44,000 trips a day.

route_b44-limited: display_name 'B44 Limited', route_label/route_name B44 Limited, route_type_normalized limited_stop, service_variant limited_stop, description says predecessor limited-stop service was replaced by B44 SBS in November 2013.
raw/sources/brt_intro_to_phase2/blocks.jsonl#p032_c0003 identifies Nostrand Avenue SBS as a planned route and describes existing B44 bus service carrying 44,000 trips a day.

The current do-not-merge policy already treats route_b44-limited as distinct from route_b44-local and route_b44-sbs; this pair covers the remaining generic Phase II B44 mention against the limited-stop variant.
proposed_do_not_merge_pairs.reason: The Phase II B44 record is a generic existing-route/source-context mention for the Nostrand SBS planning corridor, while route_b44-limited is the specific limited-stop service variant. Shared base label B44 is not enough to collapse the generic planning mention into the limited-stop route identity.

validator_evidence: duplicate_global_identity: Global route records route_b44-brt-phase2 and route_b44-sbs share identity key route_b44.
source_canonical_evidence: route_b44-brt-phase2: display_name 'B44 (Nostrand Avenue)', source_id brt_intro_to_phase2, route_id/route_label B44, note says existing B44 service carries 44,000 trips a day.

route_b44-sbs: display_name 'Nostrand Avenue-Rogers Avenue Select Bus Service (B44)', route_label B44 SBS, route_type_normalized select_bus_service, service_variant sbs, description says SBS runs on Nostrand/Rogers/Bedford in Brooklyn.
raw/sources/brt_intro_to_phase2/blocks.jsonl#p032_c0003 distinguishes existing B44 bus service from new Nostrand Avenue SBS service planned for 2011.
route_b44-sbs canonical payload includes official SBS/plus surfaces such as B44+, B44-SBS, and B44 Select Bus Service.
proposed_do_not_merge_pairs.reason: This is a predecessor/planning-context route mention versus the later SBS service variant. The source itself distinguishes existing B44 bus service from planned Nostrand Avenue SBS, so it should not be treated as the same route identity.

validator_evidence: duplicate_global_identity: Global route records route_bx55-2012 and route_bx55-lga-2012 share identity key route_bx55.
source_canonical_evidence: route_bx55-2012: display_name 'Bx55 Limited', source_ids are Webster Avenue SBS planning sources, canonical payload includes Bx55/Bx55 Limited and limited/local variant history north of Fordham Plaza.
route_bx55-lga-2012: display_name 'Bx55', source_id 2012_04_20_brt_lga_workshop_summary, description says participant-identified route from northern Bronx to LGA via Robert F. Kennedy Bridge.
raw/sources/2012_04_20_brt_lga_workshop_summary/blocks.jsonl#p003_c0006 lists participant ideas including 'Bx41/Bx55 from northern Bronx to LGA via Robert F. Kennedy Bridge'.
raw/sources/2012_04_20_brt_lga_workshop_summary/blocks.jsonl#p004_c0003 separately says participants suggested running buses along 3rd Avenue or Webster Avenue in the Bronx to LGA.
proposed_do_not_merge_pairs.reason: The LGA record is a workshop access-alternatives route idea using the Bx55 label, while the Webster record is the actual/historical Bx55 Limited/Webster service context. They are distinct route/proposal contexts despite sharing the base Bx55 key.

validator_evidence: duplicate_global_identity: Global route records route_m14-ad-sbs and route_m14-brt-phase2 share identity key route_m14.
source_canonical_evidence: route_m14-ad-sbs: display_name 'M14 A/D Select Bus Service', route_label M14 A/D SBS, routes M14A/M14D, service_variant sbs, route_type_normalized select_bus_service, source evidence says SBS services started in July 2019.
route_m14-brt-phase2: display_name 'M14 (14th Street)', source_id brt_intro_to_phase2, route_id/route_label M14, note says existing bus route on 14th Street carries 39,000 trips a day.
raw/sources/brt_intro_to_phase2/blocks.jsonl#p034_c0004 identifies the 14th Street corridor as an existing M14 bus route carrying 39,000 trips a day.
route_m14-ad-sbs canonical payload has official SBS/plus surfaces including M14+, M14-SBS, and M14 A/D SBS.
proposed_do_not_merge_pairs.reason: The Phase II record is a pre-SBS/generic M14 route mention for a potential corridor, while route_m14-ad-sbs is the later Select Bus Service variant. This is predecessor-versus-SBS context, not same route identity.

validator_evidence: duplicate_global_identity: Global route records route_q52-q53-sbs-proposed-2015-05 and route_q52-sbs-queens share identity key route_q52-sbs.
source_canonical_evidence: route_q52-q53-sbs-proposed-2015-05: display_name 'Q52/53 SBS (Proposed)', route_id Q52/Q53, route_label Q52/53 SBS, route_type_normalized select_bus_service, service_variant sbs.

route_q52-sbs-queens: display_name 'Q52 SBS bus route', route_id/route_label Q52 SBS, route_type_normalized select_bus_service, service_variant sbs; canonical payload also preserves Q52 Limited/LTD predecessor surfaces.
raw/sources/2015_06_09_brt_woodhaven_cb9/blocks.jsonl#p033_c0002 identifies changes from Q52/Q53 LTD stops.
raw/sources/2015_06_09_brt_woodhaven_cb9/blocks.jsonl#p033_c0004 depicts Proposed SBS Service with existing Q52 Route and existing Q53 Route separately.
raw/sources/2015_06_09_brt_woodhaven_cb9/blocks.jsonl#p035_c0002 labels a combined Q52/53 SBS section.
proposed_do_not_merge_pairs.reason: The proposed Q52/53 SBS record is a combined corridor/route-bundle surface, while route_q52-sbs-queens is the individual Q52 SBS route branch. Bundle-versus-branch should remain distinct rather than aliasing the combined Q52/53 proposal to Q52 alone.

validator_evidence: duplicate_global_identity: Global route records route_q53-lga-2012 and route_q53-sbs-ace share identity key route_q53.
source_canonical_evidence: route_q53-lga-2012: display_name 'Q53', source_id 2012_04_20_brt_lga_workshop_summary, description says bus route from Rockaway Park to LaGuardia Airport mentioned as a participant-identified route.

route_q53-sbs-ace: display_name 'Q53 SBS on Woodhaven Boulevard, Queens (TSP in development)', route_id/route_label Q53-SBS, route_type_normalized select_bus_service, service_variant sbs, streets Broadway/Queens Blvd/Woodhaven Blvd/Cross Bay Blvd.
raw/sources/2012_04_20_brt_lga_workshop_summary/blocks.jsonl#p003_c0006 lists 'Q53 from Rockaway Park to LGA' among participant-identified access ideas.
raw/sources/mta_automated_camera_enforcement/blocks.jsonl#p001_b0001 lists Q53-SBS in Queens on Broadway / Queens Blvd / Woodhaven Blvd / Cross Bay Blvd as an ACE route.
proposed_do_not_merge_pairs.reason: The LGA workshop Q53 record is an airport-access route idea, while route_q53-sbs-ace is the actual Q53 SBS service on the Woodhaven/Cross Bay corridor. Shared Q53 numbering is not sufficient for route identity.
